title: Wholesome Polish Eggs Pancakes
description: Fluffy, crowd-pleasing Polish pancakes made with eggs, flour, and a touch of cream of tartar, baked to perfection for a wholesome breakfast.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200C and grease a 20cm baking pan with melted butter.
In a bowl, whisk the eggs, milk, water, and sugar until well combined.
Sift flour, baking powder, and cream of tartar into a separate bowl and add a pinch of salt.
Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until a smooth batter forms.
Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan, spreading it out with a spatula.
Bake the batter for 15 minutes until the top is lightly golden and a toothpick comes out clean.
Remove the pan from the oven and let the pancakes cool for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve slices warm topped with a dollop of sour cream and a drizzle of melted butter.
Enjoy the fluffy, crowd-pleasing Polish egg pancakes for a wholesome breakfast.
